_comment: do not edit this file, it is generated
name: WebHost
author: dapaupau@sigaul.com
description: A comprehensive web hosting egg supporting PHP, Node.js, and more with an interactive management console.

installation.script:
apk add --no-cache curl git
mkdir -p /mnt/server/files
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.conf
mkdir -p /mnt/server/templates
echo "Server installed."

variables.name: Domain
variables.description: The domain name for the web server.

variables.name: Server Port
variables.description: The port the web server will listen on.

variables.name: Use SSL
variables.description: Whether to use SSL (requires certs in .conf folder).

variables.name: Web Type Override
variables.description: Manually set the web type (html, php, nodejs, react, nextjs, laravel).
